name: Lemon Cherry Gelato
short_description: Lemon Cherry Gelato is an extremely popular hybrid weed strain with several alleged origins.
medium_description: Lemon Cherry Gelato is an extremely popular hybrid weed strain with several alleged origins. It could just be Gelato bagseed, a cross between Sunset Sherbert and Girl Scout Cookies. It can also be a type of Runtz, which is Gelato x Z. Now it is so popular, samples labelled 'LCG' include a broad range of Gelato and Runtz varieties.
long_description: Lemon Cherry Gelato is an extremely popular hybrid weed strain with several alleged origins. It could just be Gelato bagseed, a cross between Sunset Sherbert and Girl Scout Cookies. It can also be a type of Runtz, which is Gelato x Z. Now it is so popular, samples labelled 'LCG' surely include a broad range of Gelato and Runtz varieties. Lemon Cherry Gelato is 20% THC, making this strain an ideal choice for experienced cannabis consumers. Customers report effects including tingly, relaxed, and euphoric. Medical marijuana patients often choose Lemon Cherry Gelato when dealing with symptoms associated with anxiety, pain, and stress. Bred by Backpackboyz, it features an aroma of lime, berries, and citrus with flavours of lemon and sweet fruit. The dominant terpene of this strain is caryophyllene.
short_notes: Those growing Lemon Cherry Gelato with standard or feminised seeds should expect to pay $10 - 15 per seed.
medium_notes: Growing Lemon Cherry Gelato with standard or feminised seeds is considered to be hard and produces a medium yield. The healthiest plants will grow to be short to medium, especially when grown in soil. Flowering time is 8 - 9 weeks.
long_notes: Those growing Lemon Cherry Gelato with standard or feminised seeds should expect to pay $10 - 15 per seed. Growing Lemon Cherry Gelato with standard or feminised seeds is considered to be hard and produces a medium yield. The healthiest plants will grow to be short to medium, especially when grown in soil. Flowering time is 8 - 9 weeks. When growing with auto-flowering seeds, the process differs slightly: auto-flowering seeds flower automatically regardless of the light cycle and are usually ready to harvest in 8 - 9 weeks from seed.

name: Blue Dream
short_description: Blue Dream is a sativa - dominant hybrid marijuana strain made by crossing Blueberry with Haze.
medium_description: Blue Dream is a sativa - dominant hybrid marijuana strain made by crossing Blueberry with Haze. This strain produces a balanced high, with effects such as cerebral stimulation and full - body relaxation. Blue Dream can be more than 20% THC but has a low CBD percentage.
long_description: Blue Dream is a sativa - dominant hybrid marijuana strain made by crossing Blueberry with Haze. This strain produces a balanced high, with effects such as cerebral stimulation and full - body relaxation. Blue Dream can be more than 20% THC but has a low CBD percentage, making this potent strain a fan favourite of both novice and veteran cannabis consumers. In terms of flavour, Blue Dream is reported to smell and taste like sweet berries. Medical marijuana patients often use Blue Dream to treat symptoms of stress, anxiety, and depression. Blue Dream originated in California and has since achieved legendary status among West Coast strains and quickly become one of the most searched - for strains. The average price per gram is $20. Similar strains include Blue Dream CBD, Double Dream, and Blue Magoo.
short_notes: Well suited for sea of green ( SOG )
medium_notes: Average flowering time of 67 days. Yields typically reach up to 430 g/m². Can exhibit different indica and sativa phenotypes.
long_notes: Well suited for sea of green ( SOG ). Average flowering time of 67 days. Yields typically reach up to 430 g/m². Can exhibit different indica and sativa phenotypes. Known to be susceptible to powdery mildew and spider mites. Can stretch when flowering.

name: Wedding Cake
short_description: Wedding Cake, also known as "Triangle Mints #23," is a potent indica - hybrid strain.
medium_description: Wedding Cake, also known as "Triangle Mints #23," is a potent type of indica - hybrid marijuana strain made by crossing Triangle Kush with Animal Mints. Known in Canada as Pink Cookies. It provides relaxing and euphoric effects that calm the body and mind.
long_description: Wedding Cake, also known as "Triangle Mints #23," is a potent type of indica - hybrid marijuana strain made by crossing Triangle Kush with Animal Mints. Fun fact: In Canada, this strain is known as Pink Cookies. The Wedding Cake strain provides relaxing and euphoric effects that calm the body and mind. This strain yields a rich and tangy flavour profile with undertones of earthy pepper. Medical marijuana patients choose Wedding Cake to help relieve symptoms associated with pain, insomnia and appetite loss. Consumers with a low THC tolerance should enjoy this strain with extra care due to its high THC content. Wedding Cake has soared in popularity over the years and was named Leafly Strain of the Year in 2019.
short_notes: Wedding Cake is a popular strain choice for intermediate and advanced growers.
medium_notes: Wedding Cake is a popular strain choice for both intermediate and advanced growers. Can be grown indoors and outdoors. Flowering time of 7 - 9 weeks. When grown outside, Wedding Cake will finish between September through October. Average yields.
long_notes: Wedding Cake is a popular strain choice for both intermediate and advanced growers. Can be grown indoors and outdoors. Flowering time of 7 - 9 weeks. When grown outside, Wedding Cake will finish between September through October. Average yields. Order Wedding Cake seeds and clones.

name: Permanent Marker
short_description: Permanent Marker is a modern cannabis strain and Leafly Strain of the Year 2023.
medium_description: Permanent Marker is a modern cannabis strain and Leafly Strain of the Year 2023. Los Angeles indie brand Doja Exclusive released it in 2022 on both coasts. Bred and grown by Seed Junky Genetics’ JBeezy and selected by Doja Pak, it fuses several well-established cultivars.
long_description: Permanent Marker is a modern cannabis strain and Leafly Strain of the Year 2023. Los Angeles indie brand Doja Exclusive released the Permanent Marker weed strain in 2022 on both coasts. Bred and grown by Seed Junky Genetics’ JBeezy and selected by Doja Pak, the strain fuses several well-established cultivars: ( Biscottix Sherb Bx ) x Jealousy. It can smell like a permanent marker. Others note its floral, soapy, candy and gassy funk that fully translate into the taste. It has a lingering, pungent flavour of a soapy funk with a hint of candy and floral gas tones. The potent strain smells amazing, and can support creativity or relaxation day and night. Just be careful — it’s strong.
